sentiment: The best tools cut with precision and share freely, building from what's common rather than what's rare.

stories.title: CRISPR tech selectively shreds cancer cells, including "undruggable" cancers
stories.summary: A new CRISPR technique shreds cancer cell DNA with molecular precision, opening doors for previously untreatable cancers.

stories.title: Open source AI must win
stories.summary: A manifesto arguing that open-source AI is essential for a healthy technological future.

stories.title: Electric motors with no rare earths
stories.summary: Renault develops electric motors that eliminate the need for rare earth minerals, using more abundant materials instead.
